title: alcea rechingeri
intro: Alcea rechingeri, also known as the Chinese hollyhock, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family that is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and flowers, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Alcea rechingeri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Alcea rechingeri can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
